drugDecisionContext.professionalReview: Aspirin decisions require cardiovascular history, bleeding history, age, ASCVD risk inputs, medication interactions, indication context, and qualified clinician review.

sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample report shows Warfarin slight resistance, normal clopidogrel effectiveness, likely aspirin effectiveness, very low statin adverse-reaction risk, and increased benefit of high-dose atorvastatin compared with standard-dose pravastatin.
sampleRows.description: The medication page explicitly warns not to stop or modify medications based on the report unless instructed by a doctor.
